root.sql: SELECT sc_com_m_branch.branch_id, sc_com_m_branch.branch_name, count( 1 ) as c_count, sum( sc_acc_m_expire.amount_value ) as c_amount, sum( sc_acc_m_expire.balance ) as c_balance FROM sc_acc_m_expire, sc_com_m_branch WHERE ( sc_acc_m_expire.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and ( ( sc_acc_m_expire.balance > 0 ) ) /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_com_m_branch.branch_id, sc_com_m_branch.branch_name ORDER BY sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ASC
